name: About This Site
description: princeofcookies.com is a personal portfolio website and optional dashboard operated by an individual developer. This Privacy Policy explains what information may be collected, how it is used, how long it may be kept, and how you can contact us about privacy-related requests.

name: Information We Collect
description:
• Basic server data: When you visit the site, the server may receive technical information such as your IP address, user agent, requested page, referrer, HTTP method, and time of access.
  • Infrastructure providers: Services such as Cloudflare and our hosting provider may process technical information including IP address, user agent, request metadata, and access timestamps for security, caching, and delivery purposes.
  • Hosting provider: Our hosting provider, Novonode, may process technical server data needed to provide hosting, security, and infrastructure services. You can read their Privacy Policy.
  • Discord login data: If you choose to log in with Discord OAuth, we may receive and store your Discord user ID, username, avatar hash, and session data needed to keep you logged in.
  • Cookies and sessions: The dashboard may use authentication cookies or similar session storage to keep you signed in for up to 12 hours.

name: How We Use Information
description:
• Security: To detect abuse, prevent unauthorized access, and protect the site.
  • Operations: To run backend services, maintain sessions, debug issues, and keep the site working.
  • Basic analytics: To understand general usage patterns, such as visited pages or interaction trends.
  • Account access: To provide optional dashboard features when you log in with Discord.

name: Legal Basis
description: Where privacy laws such as GDPR apply, we generally process information based on legitimate interests, including site security, service operation, abuse prevention, and optional account functionality. Where consent is required by law, we will rely on consent instead.

name: Data Retention
description: Information is kept only as long as reasonably needed for security, operations, debugging, account functionality, or legal compliance. Authentication sessions are intended to last up to 12 hours. Server logs and related technical records may be deleted or rotated over time.

name: Who Can Access Information
description:
• Site operator: The site operator may access information when needed for security, debugging, maintenance, or support.
  • Hosting provider: Novonode may have technical access to server data as part of providing hosting and infrastructure services. See their Privacy Policy.
  • Cloudflare: Cloudflare may process requests and related technical metadata as part of providing CDN, caching, DNS, and security services.
  • Discord: If you log in using Discord OAuth, your use of Discord is also covered by Discord’s Privacy Policy.
extra: No sale of personal information: We do not sell, rent, or intentionally share your personal information with advertisers.

name: Children's Privacy
description: This site is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided information to this site, contact us so it can be reviewed and deleted where appropriate.

name: Your Privacy Rights
description: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, or a copy of personal information associated with you. California residents may also have rights under CCPA, including rights to know, delete, opt out of sale or sharing, and non-discrimination. GDPR may provide rights such as access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. CCPA source.

name: How to Make a Request
description: To make a privacy request, email prince@strw.club. Please include enough information to identify your account or request. We may ask for additional information if needed to verify the request.

name: Governing Law
description: This Privacy Policy is intended to comply with applicable privacy laws where reasonably required, including GDPR and CCPA where applicable. Except where local law provides otherwise, this policy and any privacy-related disputes are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the site operator resides.

name: Changes to This Policy
description: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. When changes are made, the effective date will be updated accordingly. Continued use of the site after changes are posted means the updated policy applies.

name: Contact
description: For privacy questions, requests, or complaints, contact prince@strw.club.
